mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TT1.*, ROWNUM AS rnum FROM ( SELECT t1.trip_conts_id AS tripContsId, t1.trip_nm AS tripNm, COALESCE(t1.trip_path_nm, t2.file_path_nm) AS tripPathNm, t1.trip_addr AS tripAddr, t1.trip_tag AS tripTag, t1.trip_inq_cnt AS tripInqCnt, COUNT(*) OVER() AS totalCnt FROM TRIP t1 LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT board_id, MAX(file_path_nm) as file_path_nm FROM ATTACH_FILE GROUP BY board_id ) t2 ON t1.trip_conts_id = t2.board_id WHERE 1=1
AND (UPPER(t1.TRIP_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchWord}) || '%' OR UPPER(t1.TRIP_ADDR) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchWord}) || '%')
AND (
UPPER(t1.TRIP_TAG) LIKE '%' || UPPER(TRIM(#{tag})) || '%'
UPPER(t1.TRIP_TAG) LIKE '%' || UPPER(TRIM(#{tripTag})) || '%'
)
ORDER BY
t1.TRIP_INQ_CNT DESC, t1.TRIP_CONTS_ID DESC
t1.TRIP_CONTS_ID DESC
) TT1 WHERE ROWNUM <= #{pageSize} * (#{pageNo} - 1) + #{pageSize} ) WHERE rnum >= #{pageSize} * (#{pageNo} - 1) + 1
